title: WayGL
description: Forces GLFW to use Wayland on supported systems
body:
# WayGL

**Tired of all those pesky X11/Xorg bugs happening because you're using wayland? Well fear no more, I have quite the solution for you.**

WayGL will force GLFW to create a wayland window ~~(at the cost of sacrificing your window icon)~~ (NO LONGER AT THE COST OF YOUR ICON!!!) on supported systems (Linux using wayland display server).

WayGL makes use of runtime GLFW platform switching, if your on a supported platform, GLFW will be set to use Wayland.  Like this, you don’t have to worry about compiling GLFW specifically for wayland.

Say goodbye to those Xwayland bugs/compatability issues!

## 1.17.x - 1.18.x - 1.19.x Support tested on LWJGL 3.3.2 compatibility not guaranteed on other versions
LWJGL version can be changed in instance settings in prism launcher
- Instance > Edit > Version > LWJGL 3 > Change Version > 3.3.2 > Ok

###  ***Icons courtesy of [moehreag](https://github.com/moehreag)***
